resiliencehub.app.physicalresourceid.Aws.Docs: The AWS account that owns the physical resource.
The AWS Region that the physical resource is located in.

resiliencehub.app.physicalresourceid.Ide.Docs: The identifier of the physical resource.

resiliencehub.app.physicalresourceid.Typ.Docs: Specifies the type of physical resource identifier.    Arn  The resource identifier is an Amazon Resource Name (ARN) .  Native  The resource identifier is a Resilience Hub-native identifier.
